headline: The New York Times Q1 Earnings Beat on Digital Ads, Subscriber Growth
summary: NYT tops Q1 2026 estimates as digital ads surge 31.6% and 310K net digital-only subs help lift revenues 12% to $712.2M.

headline: Is the Fortinet Stock Rally Sustainable?
summary: Fortinet stock (FTNT) surged to $104 in extended trading following its first quarter 2026 earnings report on May 6, 2026. This "beat and raise" performance saw revenue hit $1.85 billion, representing 20.1% year-over-year growth and surpassing analyst estimates of $1.77 billion. While the market frequently rewards top-line growth, the underlying shift toward AI-driven security suggests a fundamental change in Fortinet's trajectory.

headline: High Growth Tech Stocks to Watch in the US May 2026
summary: The United States market has shown a robust performance, climbing 3.2% in the last week and up 31% over the past year, with earnings forecasted to grow by 16% annually. In such a dynamic environment, identifying high growth tech stocks involves looking for companies that demonstrate strong innovation potential and scalability to capitalize on these favorable market conditions.
